creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
> It would be nice if someone else reproduced this.
Yeah I see it.  It got broken somewhere between versions 11.0-alpha-3 (2020-08-01) and 11.1 (2021-01-30).

> Reported upstream, Author wontfix.
This is not exactly true.  While the author no longer officially supports BSD systems, he probably won't mind* to merge the patch so long as it fixes the bug and does not break other (supported) systems.

*) https://github.com/orbitalquark/textadept/commit/bb14dfe (see the comments)
